name: portfolio-trade-shows-example-no-trigger
description: User says they want a website, then names their trade ('portfolio website') with NO business name. Bot must do Stage 2 — show a portfolio example (screenshot + a *.pixiebot.co demo URL) and STAY in SALES_CHAT. It must NOT fire [TRIGGER_WEBSITE_DEMO] or jump to 'what's your business name?' on trade-alone. Regression for: LLM over-triggered on bare trade, skipped the example, and dumped the user straight into WEB_COLLECT_NAME.

turns.user: i want to create a website
